destinations.evidence: Nodebuilder reads registry state from the execution DB and updates the in-memory SPC verifier registry before block execution work continues.
Both nodebuilder execution paths perform the registry update as phase 1 before executor strategy setup and transaction processing.
The shared reader obtains executor records from contract storage through the execution database instead of an external log service.

equivalence_argument: The current local implementation has moved registry ownership to the TEEServiceRegistry storage reader and nodebuilder execution provider. It preserves the core invariant that block execution synchronizes the in-memory verifier registry from execution DB state before transaction execution, and SPC batch sidecar verification is not run in this phase; the contract env var/name differs from the older ExecutorRegistry wording and is tracked separately by the secure-address/default gap.
notes: Mapped in the nodebuilder dependency with supporting storage-reader code in the port repo.
rationale: The primary diff replaces the old SPC batch verification phase with update_executor_registry_from_block(), reads the registry contract through registry_db::read_executors_from_db(), atomically swaps the verifier registry from that data, and removes the startup/background registry service in favor of just-in-time execution-state population. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: During block execution, the node must update the in-memory executor registry by reading ExecutorRegistry contract storage from the execution database for the block being processed, using EXECUTOR_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS when set and the built-in default otherwise; this registry update must run before the rest of block execution in both execution paths, while SPC batch verification remains intentionally bypassed in this path.
suggested_falsification_tests: Construct a block execution test with a mock execution database containing an ExecutorRegistry state, set EXECUTOR_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS to that contract, execute a block through both block execution paths, and assert the verifier registry is populated from DB storage before subsequent phases while no SPC sidecar batch verification calls are made.
summary: Nodebuilder synchronizes the SPC executor registry from execution DB state before block execution.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Seed a mock execution database with TEEServiceRegistry executor records, execute a block through execute_one and execute_one_with_state_hook, and assert update_registry_from_data runs before transaction processing while no SPC batch sidecar verification is invoked.
title: Block execution syncs registry from execution DB
